ORDER MOTION TO VACATE DENIED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-04-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-04-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF SHARON GADBERRY IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY WITNESS PAUL COVEC (FRIEND). DEFENDANT ADRIENNE KERNAN IS PRESENT ASSISTED WITH SUPPORT BY STEVE MAYOR,(NEPHEW-IN-LAW) AND WITH WITNESS JULIA GARRETT (NIECE). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KERNAN, ADRIENNE HEARING SET FOR AUG-06-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2021 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. ADRIENNE KERNAN DOES NOT OWE SHARON GADBERRY ANY MONEY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF JUN-04-2021. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GADBERRY, SHARON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KERNAN, ADRIENNE $5,450.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,525.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF APPEAL (COURT ALLOWS FILING DATE OF APPEAL NUNC PRO TUNC TO SAME DATE AS FILING OF MOTION TO VACATE) FILED BY APPELLANT KERNAN, ADRIENNE MAILED TO RESPONDENT GADBERRY, SHARON

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ADRIENNE KERNAN ON AUG-06-2021 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF SHARON GADBERRY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ADRIENNE KERNAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG FINDS THAT THE DEFENDENT NEEDS TO FILE AN APPEAL. COURT WILL ALLOW THE FILING DATE OF THE APPEAR TO BE NUNC PRO TUNC TO THE SAME DATE AS THE FILING DATE OF JULY 1 2021. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,450.00 FILED BY GADBERRY, SHARON AS TO DEFENDANT KERNAN, ADRIENNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2021 Set For Trial On Oct-28-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 504

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-28-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Garrett L. Wong
Clerk: Danial Lemire

Present:
Plaintiff - Sharon Gadberry
Defendant - Adrienne Kernan

Parties sworn.
Accompanying the plaintiff/respondent is Paul Covec.
Accompanying the defendant/appellant is Stephen Mayer and Julia Garrett.

Both sides submit additional exhibits for the purpose of this trial.

Respondendant requests that Mr. Mayer not be allowed to answer on behalf of the defendant since he is not her counsel. Court denies the request.

Court outlines what will be adjudicated in this trial.
Previous judgment in the amount of $5,450.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,525.00.

Mr. Mayer testifies on behalf of the defendant/appellant.
Ms. Julia Garrett testifies on behalf of the defendant/appellant.
Mr. Covec testifies on behalf of the plaintiff/respondent.
Ms. Gadberry testifies on her own behalf.

Matter is taken under submission.
Judgment is reversed based on the review of the revocable trust.
Court orders all exhibits returned and they are given back to the offering parties.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-26-2021 Continued To Oct-28-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-15-2021 Continued To Oct-28-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-06-2021 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-04-2021 Judgment Entered
